subject: [KAFKA] Fix Kafka Client parameters cache reference
commit_message:
[KAFKA] Fix Kafka Client parameters cache reference

Issue-ID: DMAAP-1705
Signed-off-by: Remigiusz Janeczek <remigiusz.janeczek@nokia.com>
Change-Id: I843d808875afa21499109dd388d85064c62c9bc5

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

This change is ready for review.

Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/testsuite-python-testing-utils-master-robotframework-onap-verify-python/94/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/testsuite-python-testing-utils-master-robotframework-onap-verify-python/94

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Hi Remi. Krzystof has submitted 2 patches here - 
https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/testsuite/python-testing-utils/+/127865
https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/testsuite/+/127870

That fix the hv-ves failing.
Is this one needed also?

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> 
> Hi Remi. Krzystof has submitted 2 patches here - 
> https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/testsuite/python-testing-utils/+/127865
> https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/testsuite/+/127870
> 
> That fix the hv-ves failing.
> Is this one needed also?

Yes, because fields from cache are accessed incorrectly now.

    def _get_producer(self, alias):
        cache = self._cache.switch(alias)
        prod = KafkaProducer(bootstrap_servers=cache['bootstrap_servers'],
                             sasl_plain_username=cache['sasl_username'],
                             sasl_plain_password=cache['sasl_password'],
                             security_protocol=cache['security_protocol'],
                             ssl_context=cache['ssl_context'],
                             sasl_mechanism=cache['sasl_mechanism'],
                             request_timeout_ms=5000)
        return prod

you have: sasl_plain_username=cache['sasl_username']
while in cache the field is named: sasl_plain_username

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> > Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> > 
> > Hi Remi. Krzystof has submitted 2 patches here - 
> > https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/testsuite/python-testing-utils/+/127865
> > https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/testsuite/+/127870
> > 
> > That fix the hv-ves failing.
> > Is this one needed also?
> 
> Yes, because fields from cache are accessed incorrectly now.
> 
>     def _get_producer(self, alias):
>         cache = self._cache.switch(alias)
>         prod = KafkaProducer(bootstrap_servers=cache['bootstrap_servers'],
>                              sasl_plain_username=cache['sasl_username'],
>                              sasl_plain_password=cache['sasl_password'],
>                              security_protocol=cache['security_protocol'],
>                              ssl_context=cache['ssl_context'],
>                              sasl_mechanism=cache['sasl_mechanism'],
>                              request_timeout_ms=5000)
>         return prod
> 
> you have: sasl_plain_username=cache['sasl_username']
> while in cache the field is named: sasl_plain_username

Ok. A little confused now. Prior to my changes this was how it was being set:
https://gerrit.onap.org/r/gitweb?p=testsuite/python-testing-utils.git;a=blob;f=robotframework-onap/ONAPLibrary/KafkaKeywords.py;h=ba49d6842a24018b7ba6fff991582d9b1fb2e681;hb=949f9759c8d4b85790df5da717900737e9b29c88

    def _get_producer(self, alias):
        cache = self._cache.switch(alias)
        prod = KafkaProducer(bootstrap_servers=cache['bootstrap_servers'],
                             sasl_plain_username=cache['sasl_plain_username'],
                             sasl_plain_password=cache['sasl_plain_password'],
                             security_protocol=cache['security_protocol'],
                             ssl_context=cache['ssl_context'],
                             sasl_mechanism=cache['sasl_mechanism'],
                             request_timeout_ms=5000)
        return prod
Change has been successfully rebased and submitted as 17d603cf6655198fa61873e4d715889998a92b69 by Michal Jagiello

Patch Set 1:

> 
> > Patch Set 1:

> > > 
> > > Hi Remi. Krzystof has submitted 2 patches here - 
> > > https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/testsuite/python-testing-utils/+/127865
> > > https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/testsuite/+/127870
> > > 
> > > That fix the hv-ves failing.
> > > Is this one needed also?
> > 
> > Yes, because fields from cache are accessed incorrectly now.
> > 
> >     def _get_producer(self, alias):
> >         cache = self._cache.switch(alias)
> >         prod = KafkaProducer(bootstrap_servers=cache['bootstrap_servers'],
> >                              sasl_plain_username=cache['sasl_username'],
> >                              sasl_plain_password=cache['sasl_password'],
> >                              security_protocol=cache['security_protocol'],
> >                              ssl_context=cache['ssl_context'],
> >                              sasl_mechanism=cache['sasl_mechanism'],
> >                              request_timeout_ms=5000)
> >         return prod
> > 
> > you have: sasl_plain_username=cache['sasl_username']
> > while in cache the field is named: sasl_plain_username
> 
> Ok. A little confused now. Prior to my changes this was how it was being set:
> https://gerrit.onap.org/r/gitweb?p=testsuite/python-testing-utils.git;a=blob;f=robotframework-onap/ONAPLibrary/KafkaKeywords.py;h=ba49d6842a24018b7ba6fff991582d9b1fb2e681;hb=949f9759c8d4b85790df5da717900737e9b29c88
> 
>     def _get_producer(self, alias):
>         cache = self._cache.switch(alias)
>         prod = KafkaProducer(bootstrap_servers=cache['bootstrap_servers'],
>                              sasl_plain_username=cache['sasl_plain_username'],
>                              sasl_plain_password=cache['sasl_plain_password'],
>                              security_protocol=cache['security_protocol'],
>                              ssl_context=cache['ssl_context'],
>                              sasl_mechanism=cache['sasl_mechanism'],
>                              request_timeout_ms=5000)
>         return prod

From: https://gerrit.onap.org/r/gitweb?p=testsuite/python-testing-utils.git;a=blob;f=robotframework-onap/ONAPLibrary/KafkaKeywords.py;h=ba49d6842a24018b7ba6fff991582d9b1fb2e681;hb=949f9759c8d4b85790df5da717900737e9b29c88

  33     @keyword
  34     def connect(self, alias, kafka_host, sasl_user, sasl_password):
  35         """connect to the specified kafka server"""
  36         client = {
  37             "bootstrap_servers": kafka_host,
  38             "sasl_plain_username": sasl_user,
  39             "sasl_plain_password": sasl_password,
  40             "security_protocol": 'SASL_PLAINTEXT',
  41             "ssl_context": ssl.create_default_context(),
  42             "sasl_mechanism": 'PLAIN'
  43         }
  44         self._cache.register(client, alias=alias)


  54     def _get_producer(self, alias):
  55         cache = self._cache.switch(alias)
  56         prod = KafkaProducer(bootstrap_servers=cache['bootstrap_servers'],
  57                              sasl_plain_username=cache['sasl_plain_username'],
  58                              sasl_plain_password=cache['sasl_plain_password'],
  59                              security_protocol=cache['security_protocol'],
  60                              ssl_context=cache['ssl_context'],
  61                              sasl_mechanism=cache['sasl_mechanism'],
  62                              request_timeout_ms=5000)
  63         return prod

Names from the connect method have to match with names in _get_producer. So:
  38             "sasl_plain_username": sasl_user,
matches with:
  57                              sasl_plain_username=cache['sasl_plain_username'],

without the change I proposed here, there is a mismatch (we have "sasl_plain_username" in cache and we try to access it as "sasl_username").

My bad. Find and replace in an ide can cause silly mistakes.
